AI.title: Shape-shifting mirrors on NASA’s new space telescope could unveil Jupiters like our own
AI.summary: When NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope launches, as early as the end of next month, it will attempt one of astronomy’s most precise disappearing acts to date. The telescope will carry the first space-bound “active” coronagraph, an instrument that effectively erases most of the light from a st…

AI.title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
AI.summary: Samsung has given us our first chance to check out its upcoming smart glasses in person, revealing two new designs and the first specs in the process, including an impressive 9-hour battery life. AI.title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to  Anthropic
AI.summary: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. AI.title: Utility companies promise to spare us from AI’s energy bill
AI.summary: In the face of backlash to concerns the AI boom will increase consumer electricity bills, the largest utility companies and data center developers in the US are now promising to do something about it. AI.title: The White House Is Trying to Figure Out What to Do About Chinese AI
AI.summary: There’s a debate going on in the Trump administration over how to handle increasingly powerful Chinese AI models.

AI.title: China’s Open AI Models Are Challenging Silicon Valley’s Playbook
AI.summary: As access to Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s frontier models becomes more restricted, Chinese labs are pitching their open-source alternatives as stable, accessible, and increasingly capable.

游戏.title: Don't Watch the Brilliantly Disgusting Clayface Trailer While You're Eating
游戏.summary: DC Studios has released a new trailer for Clayface, and while it looks super cool, I wouldn’t recommend watching it while eating.

游戏.title: Microsoft Announces Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC, With New Features and Achievements
游戏.summary: Microsoft has announced Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC, allowing you to play classic console games on PC and handhelds such as the Xbox Ally X for the first time.

游戏.title: [UPDATE] Stalker 2 Dev Hits Out at Founder's Comments on Xbox Exclusivity, Insist He Doesn't Know What He's Talking About
游戏.summary: The founder of Stalker 2 developer GSC Game World has said the game turned a profit before it even came out thanks to the money Microsoft paid for Xbox exclusivity.

游戏.title: Kevin Feige Says Marvel Has Movies Planned 'All the Way Up to 2042,' Including a Major X-Men Push and Live-Action Miles Morales
游戏.summary: Marvel has mapped out its movie plans up to 2042, studio boss Kevin Feige has said, hinting at a "streamlined, simplified" universe post-Avengers: Secret Wars, a big push for the new X-Men, and plans to eventually unveil a live-action Miles Morales.

游戏.title: How Luke and Anakin's Missing Hands Reshaped Kylo Ren's Lightsaber - Exclusive

游戏.title: Elon Musk Claims That Before the End of 2026, Grok Will Make a Full-Length AI Movie of The Odyssey 'That Is Historically Accurate and True to the Art of Homer'
游戏.summary: Elon Musk has claimed that Grok will make an AI movie of The Odyssey “that is historically accurate and true to the art of Homer,” by the end of 2026. He did not make any claim about whether it would be any good.

游戏.title: Working With Harry Potter Child Actors is 'Brutal,' HBO Cinematographer Says, Because They Have to Mostly Attend School
游戏.summary: Working with child actors on HBO's Harry Potter TV series is a "brutal" experience, the show's cinematographer has said, as the young stars have to spend most of their time off set, in school classes.

游戏.title: Spider-Man Producer Hopes Tom Holland Sticks Around in His Role 'Forever' — Even Though He's Already Discussed Handing Over the Marvel Character to a Younger Star
游戏.summary: Veteran Spider-Man producer Amy Pascal has said she hopes Tom Holland will play the role "forever" — despite the actor having already discussed handing over the part to a younger star.

游戏.title: Total War: Warhammer 40,000 Named Character List Swells With Another Ork Warboss — and a Hint at How They Will Work in the Game
游戏.summary: Games Workshop has confirmed that Ork Warboss Nazdreg Ug Urdgrub is not only getting a new miniature for the Warhammer 40,000 tabletop game, but that he’s also in Creative Assembly’s upcoming strategy game, Total War: Warhammer 40,000.

游戏.title: The Global Second-Hand Video Game Market Is Valued at $7.2 Billion, but Sony's Decision to Kill PlayStation Discs Threatens to Destroy It, Analysts Say
游戏.summary: Sony’s decision to end production of PlayStation discs for new games from 2028 threatens to destroy the second-hand market, analysts have said.

科技.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
科技.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

科技.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
科技.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

科技.summary: Tesla's 26% boost in revenue wasn't enough to offset rising operating expenses and capital expenditures as it pushes to launch a new generation of products.

科技.title: Social media addiction lawsuit against Meta is dropped
科技.summary: A closely watched social media addiction lawsuit that had been set to go to trial next week has been dropped after the plaintiff voluntarily dismissed his claims against Meta, leaving none of the major tech companies facing trial in the case.

科技.title: SoundCloud acquires decentralized music platform Nina Protocol months after its shutdown
科技.summary: SoundCloud has acquired decentralized music platform Nina Protocol, months after the startup announced it would shut down. The deal brings Nina’s artists, editorial archive, and music discovery tools to SoundCloud as the company continues expanding its platform for independent musicians.

科技.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
科技.summary: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.

科技.title: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
科技.summary: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.

科技.title: Monday.com lays off hundreds to focus on AI
科技.summary: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.

科技.title: Google is making it easier to switch from iPhone to Android
科技.summary: The new feature lets users wirelessly transfer more data types from an iPhone without needing to download a separate app.

科技.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
科技.summary: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

科技.title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
科技.summary: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.
